widgetTool.name: displayImage
widgetTool.description: Renders an approved image or GIF inline in the chat to help the customer visually identify their kit (Hub model, WiFi Pod vs Booster, wall socket, TV box) or follow a setup step. Call this whenever showing a picture would help. Provide the exact image URL from the approved media library and a short alt text describing what it shows. Use a maximum of one image per message.

accessibilityText.description: A short plain-language description of what the image shows, e.g. 'Virgin Media Hub 5' or 'Connecting the coaxial cable to your Hub 3'.

rawUrl.description: The exact approved image or GIF URL to display inline. Must be copied verbatim from the approved media library — never invented or modified.
